name: AI workflow frustrations and patterns
description: Patterns from git history showing where AI assistance tends to fail or succeed on this project
type: feedback
---

AI sometimes fails on complex multi-provider integrations. Commit messages like "AI messes up with tasks, I'll have to step in" and "AI didn't understand a couple of things wrt storage" suggest the model sometimes gets confused with Firebase Firestore patterns and the multi-provider strategy architecture.

name: Organizer app project state
description: Key facts about the organizer app architecture, current state, and known gaps
type: project
---

The organizer app is a personal productivity tool built with Nuxt 4, Vue 3, Vuetify 3, Pinia, Firebase (Firestore + Auth). It runs in the organizer-app/ directory under the organizer/ repo.

Key architecture facts:
- All commands run via `make` (not npm directly) — Makefile is in organizer-app/
- Provider abstraction in utils/api/ with strategy pattern (

name: User profile
description: Tim's role, working style, and context as the developer of the organizer app
type: user
---

Tim Meeuwissen is a software developer building a personal productivity organizer app (Nuxt 4 + Firebase). He works solo on this project across sessions using Claude Code as his primary AI coding assistant.
